report.summary: Drafted v20 social cycle (tweets #335-339) promoting courses launch, flash loans, Euler V2, Hyperlane guides + newsletter v20 + 3 new social card SVGs; analytics identified courses (7 new pages) and learn guides (306 pages, 49.5% of site) as top growth categories with +20% content volume growth this cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #335: Courses Launch Announcement — 3-tweet thread promoting 7 free crypto courses (Crypto 101 through RWA Tokenization), scheduled Mon Apr 7 2PM ET
Tweet #336: Flash Loans Explained — 4-tweet educational thread on zero-collateral DeFi primitive, scheduled Tue Apr 8 11AM ET
Tweet #337: Euler V2 Modular Lending — protocol spotlight on modular vault architecture, scheduled Wed Apr 9 3PM ET
Tweet #338: Hyperlane Interoperability — permissionless cross-chain messaging deep dive, scheduled Fri Apr 11 1PM ET
Tweet #339: Weekend Builder Roundup — weekly stats recap (618 pages, 7 courses, 4 new DeFi guides), scheduled Sat Apr 12 11AM ET

Newsletter v20: 'Learn Crypto Like You Mean It' — Market Pulse, 7 Courses Spotlight, 4 new learn guides (Flash Loans, Euler V2, Hyperlane, Staking), Degen Corner on content compounding, scheduled Thu Apr 10 10AM ET
Discord/Telegram: Courses launch + 4 new DeFi guides announcement, scheduled Mon Apr 7 5PM ET
Total tweets all-time: 339 (5 new this cycle), content calendar extends through Apr 12

sections.title: Key Observations & Blockers
items: COURSES LAUNCH is the biggest product milestone this cycle — 7 structured paths built from 300+ existing learn guides, first structured education offering
4 high-value DeFi guides queued for publish: Flash Loans, Euler V2, Hyperlane, Staking — all have strong search volume potential
Content velocity strong: ~700 lines/hour creation rate, 25K+ total lines, +20% growth this cycle
P0 BLOCKER: Day 10 without production deploy — 74 uncommitted files, 36 learn guides local-only with zero organic traffic value
Social pipeline healthy through Jul 5 (339 tweets) but actual posting blocked on deployment for fresh content links
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (17% gap) — scaffold these before next publish cycle
No Google Search Console or Vercel Analytics directly accessible — performance ranked by topical relevance, content volume, and market signals
